title: premna lepidella
intro: Premna lepidella is a plant species commonly known as the "Blue Dust" or "Dust Bush", belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and its leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. Premna lepidella can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic formulations, to harness its health benefits.
